The '''KS-500 Spaceways Transport light freighter''' was a standard [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] produced by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. They were high performance vehicles which could be easily modified, as was evidenced with ''[[The Fatal Vision]]''.
